rules: Never center headings by default; align left for narrative flow unless in hero or center-focused section.
Use JetBrains Mono for tech-focused metrics, overlines, or developer-centric details.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, The Control Room for Dashboard

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00E5FF] to-[#00B4D8] text-[#05050A] font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,229,255,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md

cards.service_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 p-8 group
cards.portfolio_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl group cursor-pointer aspect-video

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#05050A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 transition-all duration-300

inputs.form_field: w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder-slate-500

global.framer_motion: Use for scroll reveals, text staggers, and glass card hover states (3D tilt effect).

three_js_hero.description: Large floating 3D 'V' monogram in the center, surrounded by interactive particles and glowing network lines.
three_js_hero.lighting: Use PointLights and ambient light to create a moody, glowing effect reflecting off the 3D V geometry.

interactions.hover_tilt: Use Framer Motion useMotionValue and useTransform for realistic 3D card tilts in the Services section.
interactions.glow_reveal: Cards should have a radial gradient glow following the mouse pointer.

attributes: All interactive components MUST use data-testid attributes

instructions_to_main_agent.overall: Implement a hybrid architecture: purely custom HTML/Tailwind with Framer Motion for the marketing site sections, and Shadcn UI components for the backend admin dashboard and contact form to ensure flawless functionality.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_section: Build a Canvas wrapper for the Three.js scene. Render a 3D letter 'V' geometry with metallic/glass material and float it using Drei's Float component. Use Points for the particle background.
instructions_to_main_agent.services_section: Create 7 glassmorphic cards. Use Framer Motion's useMotionValue to track mouse position on the card and apply rotateX/rotateY transforms on hover. Do not use generic 2D hover effects.
instructions_to_main_agent.portfolio_section: Create a smooth horizontal scroll carousel or bento grid using the provided 6 placeholder images.
instructions_to_main_agent.contact_form: Build using Shadcn Form/Input components. Customize Shadcn styles heavily by removing the default white backgrounds, switching to 'bg-white/5 border-white/10', and altering focus rings to #00E5FF to blend perfectly with the dark theme.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_dashboard: Create a distinct '/admin' route layout. Keep it dark mode but utilize the 'Control Room' grid density. It should list incoming leads in a data table (Shadcn Table) with stats like total inquiries, recent requests, etc. Use 1px solid strokes instead of heavy shadows for dashboard cards.
